data.body:
SHIPPED as PR #741 (https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/pull/741) against main, resolves #740. Commit 7592f02c pushed to giverm/OSCER-740-config-loading-extraction. Comprehensive first-commit message (squash source) + purpose-built reviewer-facing PR body (discloses the shared-ConfigurationError observable delta). Final state: full suite 2438 ex 0 failures, coverage 96.23/82.82... (96.23 line / 82.92 branch), RuboCop clean. Awaiting CI + reviewer.

Follow-up still open: retitle this ticket "base class" -> "shared module".
